news.title: Are companies getting a return on investment from AI yet?
news.summary: Are industries starting to see a return on investment (ROI) from AI services? JPMorgan Chase (JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon told Business Insider that while AI has helped reduce jobs in certain areas of the major bank, it hasn't contributed toward shrinking operating costs. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley and Business Insider Today executive editor Dan DeFrancesco to talk more about how companies are using AI to boost efficiency.
